creator: christop@physik.tu-berlin.de
text:
Mikle Davidkin schrieb:
> I notice that ejabberd port hasn't updated for a long time and so -
> prepared a new version (tested on FreeBSD 6.3 amd64 but surely will work
> with lastest releases).
> It fixes this PR and all others related to this port: ports/105122,
> ports/127348, ports/129681.
> Also i want to request port mantainership as i see current mantainer has
> not time to deal with it...
> 
> Included patch for port and for UIDs and GIDs files (because of changing
> ejabberd uid and gid - see PR ports/105122). Also here is notice for
> UPDATING:
> 
> Affects: users of net-im/ejabberd
> Reason:
>   ejabberd's UID and GID have changed (PR ports/105122). Users are advised
>   to check all configuration files and data in /var/spool/ejabberd to
>   ensure everything has the correct owner/group.

I tested this patch and it worked for me on FreeBSD amd64 7.0 and 7.1.
Thank you very much.

Regards
	Christoph
